title: Vibrant Vietnamese Shrimp Goi Cuon
description: A fresh and energizing Vietnamese dish featuring shrimp and naan bread, served in a goi cuon form and grilled to perfection on a robata grill, kosher friendly and deep fry tod for added crunch.
instructions: Prepare the robata grill by preheating it to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the shrimp, rice noodles, carrots, cucumber, and mint leaves.
In a small bowl, whisk together the peanut sauce and vegetable oil.
Add the peanut sauce mixture to the shrimp mixture and toss to combine.
Cut the naan bread into quarters and grill on the robata grill for 2 minutes per side.
Assemble the goi cuon by placing a quarter of the shrimp mixture onto a piece of grilled naan bread and rolling it up.
Deep fry the rolled goi cuon in 350 degree Fahrenheit oil for 2 minutes or until golden brown.
